journey_header.heading: From studio discipline to national scale
journey_header.description: A timeline of how HAGX grew from architectural thinking into a fully integrated glass, aluminium, manufacturing, and material supply partner.

journey.title: The Birth of Precision
body: HAGX Studio was founded with a vision to raise the standard of glass and aluminium installation in Thailand to an international level.
Beginning as an architectural design and material advisory team, we developed a deep understanding of structure, systems, and design intent.

journey.title: Strength from In-House Expertise
body: We expanded our capability with an in-house installation team and assembly factory to reduce outsourcing and keep craftsmanship under the HAGX standard.
Pre-delivery inspection became part of our production workflow, ensuring that every product and component is ready for real site conditions.

journey.title: Beyond Installation: A Trusted Partner
body: HAGX became an official distributor for leading material brands, expanding from installation into complete material system support.
Our scope now covers ceiling, lightweight wall, and hardware products for clients who need a true one-stop service.

journey.title: Innovation and National Scale
body: Today, HAGX is more than a contractor. We are a key player in Thailand's glass and aluminium market, driven by precise operating systems.
We are ready to supply materials and deliver large-scale installation projects nationwide with speed and proven reliability.

statement.heading: Complete solutions for every glass and aluminium requirement
statement.description: Our goal is to make every project align with its required function, budget, design, and quality.

values.title: Standards that stay visible at every step
values.description: Each HAGX value is carried through the work itself, from design to final delivery.

items.title: Experience & Local Mastery
items.subtitle: Long-standing expertise shaped by real local conditions.
items.description: With more than 20 years across glass, aluminium, and interior works, we understand both technical detail and real site conditions.

items.title: Reliable Accountability
items.subtitle: Transparent advice and accountable delivery.
items.description: HAGX is grounded in transparency, integrity, and long-term responsibility, helping clients choose the most worthwhile solution for every investment.

items.title: Precision & Punctuality
items.subtitle: Refined fabrication with disciplined delivery timelines.
items.description: Every piece is checked through our in-house process to ensure accurate fit, clean execution, and delivery within the agreed schedule.

items.title: Innovative Material Selection
items.subtitle: Advanced materials selected for function, beauty, and performance.
items.description: We source leading aluminium systems and high-spec glass technologies to create solutions that balance performance with architectural expression.

cta.title: Ready to start your project?
